creator: dcarmich@dcarmichael.net
text:
Created attachment 154466
ui.c patch (referenced from mentioned github issue)

To whom it may concern:

I have been experiencing the issue of marco consistently core dumping with a SIGABRT upon startup because of it being unable to find the name specified for a GTK default icon.

(Referenced in this issue I filed: https://github.com/mate-desktop/marco/issues/181)

I have attached my own patch to fix the issue, would this be appropriate to commit to the port?

(I have no idea if it will be fixed in the current upstream.)

Thanks!

--Douglas
